subject: contrast: AREtomo vs WARP
body:
dear community,

I have included AREtomo as part of my WARP pipeline in order to get .xf 
file for alignment.  The AREtomo tomograms look quite nice, however when I 
use the .xf file to generate the WARP tomogram I notice the contrast is 
substantially worse.  See image below.  The tomogram looks otherwise 
reasonable, it just has really bad contrast.  For AREtomo I was also using 
WBP (which I think WARP does).

Is this to be expected? is it because WARP has corrected CTF and therefore 
less contrast?

thanks!



[image: Screenshot 2023-11-23 at 1.35.02 PM.png]
